headline: O'Reilly Automotive Inc (NASDAQ:ORLY) Posts Q1 Revenue and Earnings Beat, Stock Rises in After-Hours Trading
summary: O'Reilly Automotive beat Q1 2026 estimates with $4.56B revenue and $0.72 EPS. Stock gained 4.7% after-hours despite recent dips, driven by strong auto parts demand.

headline: O’Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Delivered 33rd Consecutive Year of Positive Comp Growth
summary: Wedgewood Partners, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Wedgewood Composite returned -6.3% (net) in the first quarter compared to the S&P 500’s -4.3%, the Russell 1000 Growth Index’s -9.8%, and the Russell 1000 Value Index’s 2.1% returns.
